arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Slovan Bratislava: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch & more!
arts.sum: With a win over Bratislava, Bayern will need seven of the following 10 results to go their way in order to secure a top eight finish in the Champions League table: Aston Villa draw/loss to Celtic (if Celtic wins, Bayern will need to hold five-goal differential)

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich still keeping eyes open on goalkeeper market after signing Jonas Urbig
arts.sum: Even after the signing of Jonas Urbig, Bayern are still keeping an eye on the goalkeeping market for 2026 in the event that none of the current alternatives (Urbig, Peretz, Nübel) develop as a worthy Neuer successor. Jonas Urbig has joined Bayern Munich from FC Köln on a long-term deal worth roughly 10-million euros that will keep him with the Rekordmeister through June of 2029.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl: Vincent Kompany “biggest” addition to Bayern Munich in 2024
arts.sum: “I think the biggest gain we have is Vincent Kompany,” Bayern executive board member for sport Max Eberl stated simply in recent comments captured by Bild, via @iMiaSanMia . Bayern Munich made a number of big signings in last summer’s transfer window —but none were as impactful as the selection of head coach Vincent Kompany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich crunching numbers for possibilities of top eight finish in Champions League
arts.sum: Internally, calculations are being made - and Bayern are determined not only to beat Bratislava, but to do so with a big scoreline in order to have the best position as far as the goal difference is concerned. Realistically, Bayern need a miracle - but they want to do their homework against Bratislava and hope the other results will play into their hands.

arts.ttl: Healthy obsession: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane on his nose for goal
arts.sum: For that, I must constantly observe the game, my teammates, my opponents, to define the best movement to have a chance to score.” Bayern Munich knows what it is like to have a striker who is laser-focused on scoring goals.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich signs young goalkeeper Jonas Urbig as possible successor for Manuel Neuer
arts.sum: The 21-year-old Urbig is considered one of Germany’s best young goalkeepers, and his move to Bayern suggests the club believes he could one day replace Manuel Neuer, who is still No. 1 but heading toward the end of his career at 38. On loan at Stuttgart, the 28-year-old Alexander Nübel is another potential successor for Neuer.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Slovan Bratislava preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Bayern Munich and Slovan Bratislava, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, Manchester City, Liverpool, PSG chasing him; Chelsea, Manchester United want RB Leipzig’s Benjamin Šeško; Liverpool eyeing Rayan Cherki; and MORE!
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich is set to become one of the most in-demand free agents in world football when his Bayern Munich contract expires in the summer. Bayern Munich midfielder/right-back Joshua Kimmich was named to kicker’s Bundesliga Team of the week for his work vs.

arts.ttl: Three Bayern Munich players nominated for the EA Sports FC Team of the Year
arts.sum: Bayern’s three nominees are Joshua Kimmich, Jamal Musiala, and Harry Kane. EA Sports FC has named 3 Bayern Munich players in the shortlist of nominees to make their Team of the Year.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl remains tight-lipped on potential new deal for Eric Dier at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: In football, few topics spark as much speculation as contract renewals, but Bayern Munich sporting director Max Eberl prefers to stay focused on the present. For now, Dier’s performances will do the talking, and Bayern fans will hope he continues to deliver when it matters most.
